title: AP-Tender Bid Opening Sequence (Withdrawal → Substitution → Modification → Technical)
text_english: BID OPENING SEQUENCE: Envelopes shall be OPENED in the following ORDER: (i) FIRST — envelopes marked 'WITHDRAWAL' shall be OPENED and READ OUT; the corresponding Bid envelope SHALL NOT be OPENED but RETURNED to the Bidder. NO bid withdrawal SHALL be PERMITTED unless the corresponding withdrawal notice contains a VALID AUTHORIZATION read out at Bid opening. (ii) NEXT — envelopes marked 'SUBSTITUTION' shall be OPENED and READ OUT and EXCHANGED with the corresponding Bid; the substituted Bid SHALL NOT be OPENED but RETURNED. (iii) NEXT — envelopes marked 'MODIFICATION' shall be OPENED and READ OUT with the corresponding Bid; only with valid authorization. (iv) NEXT — all 'TECHNICAL PART' envelopes shall be OPENED ONE AT A TIME. Bid opening date: {{bid_open_date}}; venue: {{bid_open_venue}}.
